---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve Contai
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 📋 Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
1. Run command: `node contai.js ...`
2. With config: [e.g., crypto, saas, etc.]
3. See error: [copy/paste error message]

## ✅ Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots/Error Messages
If applicable, add screenshots or copy/paste error messages to help explain your problem.

## 🖥️ Environment:
- **OS:** [e.g., macOS, Windows, Linux, Termux]
- **Node version:** [e.g., v18.0.0]
- **Contai version:** [e.g., v2.0.0]
- **Command used:** [e.g., `node contai.js thread "topic" twitter`]

## 📝 Config (remove sensitive info):
```json
{
  "brand": {
    "name": "Your Brand"
  },
  "niche": {
    "industry": "Your Industry"
  },
  "news": {
    "enabled": true
  }
}
```

## 💡 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I've checked the [documentation](../README.md)
- [ ] I've checked existing issues
- [ ] I've tried with the latest version
- [ ] I've removed sensitive info from config
